summary: The protagonist, Yeong-Chan, successfully completes the ninth stage of a mysterious trial where he faces manifestations of loved ones. Although he fears the emotional weight of these trials, he receives confirmation that these entities are only data and cannot truly harm him. Following the intense experience, Yeong-Chan expresses profound relief and gratitude toward his supportive family, deciding to celebrate by treating them to fried chicken.
key_moments: Yeong-Chan completes the ninth stage of the test.
A mysterious voice clarifies that the entities encountered are merely recreations of loved ones and cannot cause harm.
Yeong-Chan processes the emotional encounter and decides to treat his family to a meal.
